scenarios.title: Clean recipe utterance routes to recipe_search and returns sourced response

gherkin.given: the recipe_search skill is enabled and the graph contains recipe artifacts
gherkin.then: the assistant returns a sourced recipe response with Sources[] non-empty and reply is NOT the BandLow idea-capture string

scenarios.title: Misspelled recipe utterance routes via router-boundary normalization (adversarial)

gherkin.then: the router normalizes embed input to "find best recipe", envelope.RawInput is preserved, and routing reaches recipe_search at BandHigh

gherkin.given: the recipe_search skill is enabled and the graph has no recipe artifacts
gherkin.then: Status=StatusUnavailable, ErrorCause=ErrNoMatch, CaptureRoute=false, body names a next concrete action, and body does NOT contain "saved as an idea"

scenarios.title: Telegram adapter does not render idea-capture for recipe_search responses

gherkin.when: the Telegram adapter renders the reply
gherkin.then: the sent message does NOT match /^\. Saved: ".*" \(idea\)$/

scenarios.title: Live-stack meal-plan -> recipe -> shopping loop unaffected

gherkin.given: the live test stack is up
gherkin.when: the /api/search endpoint is queried with filters.domain="recipe"
gherkin.then: the response is well-formed and does not contain the pre-fix idea-capture artifact title
